name: Gear Up, Roll Out
summary: Leave DIS for a chosen destination. Gain 3 Fuel, say what happens just before you go, then pick one: Extra Escort (Fire Support, More Guns, Squadmates tags), Overfuel (+2 Fuel), or Advanced Recon (hidden base, friendly scout, or supply cache at arrival).

name: Travel
summary: Spend 2 Fuel to move your current Map Speed on the STRATCOM map. Roll on the Travel events table or ask the GM what happens along the way.

name: Scavenge
summary: Pull over and hunt for fuel, supplies, or something special. Tell the GM what you need and what gets in the way, or use the Scavenge table. Gain 1 Revelation and roll the Tone Die.

name: Scout
summary: Spend 1 Revelation and find something—an abandoned outpost, ruined caravan, or advancing war-party. Roll on the Scout table, use the Tone Die, or ask the GM what happens.

name: Arrive
summary: Your destination rises to meet you. Roll a Tone Die, ask the GM what's waiting, and explain your approach.
